data.title: Nasdaq Dips 3% Amid Plunge In Nvidia, AMD: Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
Google Faces A Mammoth $6.6 Billion UK Class Action Lawsuit Over Reported Ad Price Inflation, Market Abuse
data.description: Google, a part of Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG), is confronted with a £5 billion ($6.6 billion) class action lawsuit in the U.K. The company is accused of exploiting its dominant market position in the online search industry.

data.title: Elon Musk's Team Installs Starlink Satellite Equipment At Key Federal Agency: Report
data.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk's influence in President Donald Trump's Department of Government Efficiency has taken physical form.

data.title: Joe Rogan Hails Tesla's FSD As He Uses It To Drive Home: Calls It 'F***ing Wild'
data.description: Joe Rogan praises Tesla's FSD technology for its accuracy in navigating traffic amid autonomous driving race.

data.title: Alcoa Warns Tariffs Could Cost $425 Million Annually: 'This Is The Most Material Impact' Says CEO
data.description: Alcoa Corp. the largest aluminum producer in the United States, reported $20 million in additional costs during its first quarter.
